ai_summary: **Executive Summary:**  Aster DM Healthcare Limited has officially changed its name to Aster DM Quality Care Limited, effective July 3, 2026, as a direct consequence of its amalgamation with Quality Care India Limited. This regulatory filing confirms the legal completion of a significant corporate restructuring, indicating the integration of QCIL and signaling material operational and financial impacts for the newly combined entity. No red flags are apparent in this procedural update, which is a standard step following a merger.
